summary: Workshop Dashboard (Cruscotto Officina) fully tested. All 16 backend tests passed for GET /api/dashboard/stats endpoint. Frontend dashboard loads correctly with all KPI cards, Quick Actions, and widgets visible. All data-testid selectors working. Quick action navigation verified. Design is clean with proper colors and spacing.

backend.Response contains all required fields: PASS - ferro_kg, distinte_attive, cantieri_attivi, pos_mese, fatturato_mese, scadenze, materiale, recent_invoices
backend.ferro_kg aggregation: PASS - Correctly sums total_weight_kg from active distinte (bozza, confermata, ordinata)
backend.cantieri_attivi count: PASS - Correctly counts POS with status bozza or completo
backend.pos_mese count: PASS - Correctly counts POS created this month
backend.fatturato_mese sum: PASS - Correctly sums invoice totals for emessa/pagata/inviata_sdi/accettata
backend.scadenze structure: PASS - Returns pos_id, project_name, deadline, city with correct date calculation
backend.materiale structure: PASS - Returns profile, bars, total_m from calculate_bars_needed
backend.recent_invoices structure: PASS - Returns invoice_id, document_number, client_name, status, issue_date, totals

frontend.data-testid='kpi-ferro': PASS - Ferro in Lavorazione KPI card
frontend.data-testid='qa-rilievo': PASS - Nuovo Rilievo button, navigates to /rilievi
frontend.data-testid='qa-distinta': PASS - Nuova Distinta button, navigates to /distinte/new
frontend.data-testid='qa-pos': PASS - Stampa POS button, navigates to /sicurezza
frontend.KPI values populated from API: PASS - All KPIs show real data from backend

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 12 data-testid elements present, all navigations working)

test_credentials: Created test user test-dashboard-1772194509867 with session token, seed data for distinta/POS/invoices, cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Created 1 distinta (confermata, 125.5kg), 2 POS documents (bozza, completo), 2 invoices (emessa, pagata) for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workshop Dashboard (Cruscotto Officina) fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/dashboard/stats requires authentication and aggregates data from distinte (ferro_kg, materiale), pos_documents (cantieri_attivi, pos_mese, scadenze), and invoices (fatturato_mese, recent_invoices). Frontend shows 4 KPIs, 3 Quick Actions, and 3 widgets. All data-testid attributes properly implemented.
